confirm.title: Add Urban Arrow
confirm.description: Add the bike found at {address}. Make sure the display is on while it is being set up.

user.title: Urban Arrow
user.description: Pick a discovered bike, or enter its Bluetooth address manually.

manual.title: Enter address
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth address of the bike (e.g. FD:F1:8F:61:1D:F7).

error.invalid_address: That is not a valid Bluetooth address.

abort.no_devices_found: No Urban Arrow bike found. Turn on the display and bring it near a Bluetooth proxy.
